Comment.value: This script is called from the Duplicate Card window
This script is also called from Duplicate Title Step 2
This script is also called from Move Package
When called - the clone level, clone item and info is stored in Title global fields
Clone settings can include: IOs Links Lists Tags Score Localised texts
old_tt_id only used when duplicating a Title or when moving a package
Even if the called scripts below can retreive the Old Title id, we don't include it as a parameter.
isClonedTitle is always = FALSE (0) when called from this script.
NOTE!!! OldPrimaryKeyFromClone ONLY lives inside the active cloneSession. All existing values are deleted as a first step in a new clone session.
The clone_start_timestamp will be used when searching for newly created text fields
-------- CLEAN UP ALL OLDPRIMARY FROM CLONE IN Tags, Lists, Links, IOs in the whole Title ---------------------

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_group_id" ; $item_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_group_id" ; $item_id )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $item_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; $item_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_ch_id" ; $item_id ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; $item_parent_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_ch_id" ; $item_id ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; $item_parent_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_pg_id" ; $item_id ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; $item_parent_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_pg_id" ; $item_id ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; $item_parent_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_pi_id" ; $item_id ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; $item_parent_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; "" ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_pi_id" ; $item_id ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; $item_parent_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_sortindex" ; $new_sortindex )

Comment.value: Find all page items, IO values with boolean IO Array and list items to find IO arrays. Find and replace references to all newly created IOs on OldPrimaryKeys
Fix text variables only if they are in same Title.
Traverse through all ModifierValues and List items to find references to newly created links in OldPrimaryKeys

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ("exportedTitlesToUpdate"; FAT Title::PrimaryKey) & SetProperty ("publishedTitlesToUpdate"; FAT Title::PrimaryKey)
"Any package in the new title will be ready to launch within a few minutes. "
"The packages in the package group will be ready to launch within a few minutes. "
"The moved package will be ready to launch within a few minutes. "
"The new package will be ready to launch within a few minutes. "
